_comment: TEMPLATE — filenames starting with _ are ignored by the loader and never render. Copy this shape for real entries. STRICT SCOPE: legislation only — bills, statutes, and local ordinances. NO court rulings or agency actions. Every entry needs a title, a plain-English summary in our OWN words, a known category + status, and a public sourceUrl. Never republish source text; summarize and link out.
title: EXAMPLE — HB 0000 Short Descriptive Title (delete me)
summary: One short paragraph, in our own words, on what the bill/statute/ordinance does.
whyItMatters: One or two factual sentences on how it affects Texas landowners.
